summary: Comprehensive testing of Herion v4.0 - Creator Control Room, Father Agent, Practice Catalog, Authority Registry. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Public Welcome page, Creator login with auto-redirect to /creator, Admin login to /dashboard, Creator Control Room with CREATOR badge and HERION-CREATOR-001 UUID, Profile/Settings page, Agents page with all 12 agents (11 specialists + Father Agent). Fixed one UI bug: AgentsPage.jsx was showing 'Herion Admin' instead of 'Herion Father Agent'.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Root endpoint accessible
Backend: Creator login (gegexia94@gmail.com / HerionCreator2026!) works correctly
Backend: Creator login returns is_creator=true, creator_uuid=HERION-CREATOR-001, role=creator
Backend: Creator email blocked from public registration
Backend: Admin login (admin@aic.it / Admin123!) works correctly
Backend: Admin login returns role=admin, is_creator=false
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/catalog returns 20 practice catalog entries
Backend: Catalog requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/registry returns 14+ authority registry entries
Backend: Registry requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/agents/info returns 12 total agents (11 specialists + Father Agent)
Backend: Pipeline has 11 workflow steps including research and routing
Backend: Father Agent labeled 'Herion Father Agent' not 'Herion Admin'
Backend: GET /api/auth/profile returns user info
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile updates user info
Backend: Creator profile has is_creator and creator_uuid fields
Backend: Practice status update works for all statuses (draft, waiting_approval, blocked, escalated, in_progress)
Frontend: Public Welcome page loads without login
Frontend: Welcome page has Italian copy and 'Inizia ora' / 'Accedi' buttons
Frontend: All Welcome page sections present (features, benefits, how-it-works, audience, value, about, cta, footer)
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /dashboard (NOT /creator)
Frontend: Control Room nav item NOT visible to admin
Frontend: Creator login redirects to /creator (Creator Control Room)
Frontend: Creator Control Room shows CREATOR badge and HERION-CREATOR-001 UUID
Frontend: Control Room nav item visible to Creator
Frontend: Profile/Settings page loads with all form fields
Frontend: Agents page shows 'Herion Father Agent' (fixed from 'Herion Admin')
Frontend: Agents page shows all 11 specialist agents including Research and Routing
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AgentsPage.jsx (fixed 'Herion Admin' to use admin_agent.name from API, added research and routing icons/colors)
seed_data_creation: Creator account bootstrapped on startup (protected, not via public registration). Admin user auto-created. Practice Catalog (20 entries) and Authority Registry (14+ entries) seeded on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Herion v4.0 Creator Control Room is fully functional. Key features: 1) Public Welcome page at / with Italian copy 2) Protected Creator bootstrap (gegexia94@gmail.com, role=creator, is_creator=true, creator_uuid=HERION-CREATOR-001) 3) Father Agent replaces old Admin as orchestrator 4) 11 specialist agents: intake, ledger, compliance, documents, delegate, deadline, flow, routing, research, monitor, advisor 5) Practice Catalog (20 entries) and Authority Registry (14+ entries) seeded on startup 6) Creator Control Room at /creator (creator-only access) 7) Profile settings at /profile. The Creator account was bootstrapped via protected backend logic, not public registration. Creator email is blocked from public registration.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset email is MOCKED - reset link logged to backend console
mocked_apis.llm_calls: NOT MOCKED - All LLM calls use real Emergent LLM Key for GPT-5.2

bug_fixed.issue: AgentsPage.jsx was displaying 'Herion Admin' instead of 'Herion Father Agent'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Hardcoded 'Herion Admin' text instead of using agentsInfo.admin_agent.name from API
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use {agentsInfo.admin_agent.name} and added icons/colors for research and routing agents
bug_fixed.verification: Frontend now correctly displays 'Herion Father Agent' on Agents page
